description:
CLI for the Pagliacci Pizza ordering API. Browse stores, menus, and
available slices; manage your cart, place orders, and track delivery
windows; manage saved addresses, rewards, stored coupons, credit, and
gifts. Backed by Pagliacci's Azure-hosted REST API and authenticated
via Chrome cookies (composed PagliacciAuth header).

tools.name: account_confirm_email
tools.description: Confirm a new account by clicking the email-confirmation link's token (public)

tools.name: account_create_token
tools.description: Issue a session token (used internally by the SPA for token refresh) (public)

tools.name: account_login
tools.description: Authenticate with email/phone + password. Response sets customerId and authToken cookies. (public)

tools.name: account_password_reset
tools.description: Reset a password using a token from PasswordForgot email (public)

tools.name: address_lookup
tools.description: Validate an address and check delivery zone (returns store ID if deliverable) (public)

tools.name: menu_cache
tools.description: Get the full menu (categories, products, prices, descriptions, images) for a store (public)

tools.name: menu_product_price
tools.description: Calculate the price for a customized product (size, toppings, modifiers) (public)

tools.name: menu_slices
tools.description: Get available slices across all stores for the current day (perishable, rotates daily) (public)

tools.name: menu_top
tools.description: Get featured top-of-menu items for a store (public)

tools.name: scheduling_slot_list
tools.description: List available time-window slots for a store and service type (public)

tools.name: scheduling_slot_list_for_date
tools.description: List allowed slot times for a specific delivery/pickup date (YYYYMMDD) (public)

tools.name: scheduling_window_days
tools.description: List available delivery or pickup days for a store. serviceType is DEL (delivery) or PICK (pickup) (public)

tools.name: store_get
tools.description: Get a single store by its numeric ID (public)

tools.name: store_list
tools.description: List all Pagliacci store locations with addresses, hours, GPS, amenities, and available slices (public)

tools.name: system_site_wide_message
tools.description: Get site-wide announcement banner text (closures, holiday hours, etc.) (public)
